column1: 【2】Git 平台 Secret / 密码须与下方 webhook_secret 一致；推荐使用 Authorization: Bearer。

column1: 【4】未能自动推断站点域名，请追加 --base-url=https://你的域名 后重新运行以输出完整部署地址与 curl。
column2: 【4】未能自动推断站点域名，请追加 --base-url=https://你的域名 后重新运行以输出完整部署地址与 curl。

column1: 【5】仅在专用部署目录测试 curl，避免误触发开发机上的未提交代码。

column2: 【6】本次已生成新的 Webhook 密钥并写入后台配置，请同步更新 Git 平台 Webhook 中的密钥。

column1: 【7】部署 SSH 公钥：将公钥添加到 Git 平台「部署公钥 / Deploy Key」（只读即可），服务器私钥位于 %{1}（勿提交 Git）。
column2: 【7】部署 SSH 公钥：将公钥添加到 Git 平台「部署公钥 / Deploy Key」（只读即可），服务器私钥位于 %{1}（勿提交 Git）。

column1: 【8】使用 SSH 拉取时，将后台「项目仓库地址」改为 git@ 形式，并确保部署用户默认使用该私钥（如配置 GIT_SSH_COMMAND 或 ~/.ssh/config）。
column2: 【8】使用 SSH 拉取时，将后台「项目仓库地址」改为 git@ 形式，并确保部署用户默认使用该私钥（如配置 GIT_SSH_COMMAND 或 ~/.ssh/config）。

column1: Webhook 随机路径与站点其他路径共用 WLS 反代，无需单独 fastcgi 入口。
column2: Webhook random path shares the same WLS reverse proxy as the rest of the site; no extra fastcgi entry is required.

column1: 默认仅 Tag Push：分支测试会返回 trigger_mode_tag_only；选择分支或两者都生效后，branch_mismatch 表示分支不匹配。
column2: Default is Tag Push only: branch tests return trigger_mode_tag_only. After selecting Branch or Both, branch_mismatch means the branch filter did not match.

column1: 默认仅 Tag Push；只有明确选择分支模式或两者都生效时才响应分支 push。
column2: Default is Tag Push only; branch pushes are accepted only when Branch or Both is selected explicitly.

column1: 留空匹配所有分支；填写后仅该分支的 push 触发部署
column2: Leave empty to match all branches; set to only trigger on pushes to this branch

column1: 留空匹配所有 tag；填写后仅匹配此前缀的 tag 触发部署
column2: 留空匹配所有 tag；填写后仅匹配此前缀的 tag 触发部署

column1: 访问 Webhook 路径后加 /version?token=xxx 可查看详细版本信息
column2: Append /version?token=xxx to the Webhook path to view detailed version info

column1: 分支 Push 版本 = commit 短 SHA（如 a3f5c2d）；Tag Push 版本 = tag 名（如 v2.4.1）。
column2: Branch push version = commit short SHA (e.g. a3f5c2d); Tag push version = tag name (e.g. v2.4.1).

column1: 「触发模式」选「仅 Tag Push」时，Webhook 触发事件需额外勾选「Tag Push」；选「仅分支 Push」或「都生效」时勾选「Push」即可。
column2: When trigger mode is \Tag Push Only\"
column3: also check \"Tag Push\" in Gitee webhook events; for \"Branch Only\" or \"Both\"

column1: 默认「Just the push event」已包含分支和 tag push，无需额外配置。
column2: GitHub's default \Just the push event\" already covers both branch and tag push — no extra config needed."

column1: 已配置，留空表示保留当前项目密钥
column2: Configured; leave blank to keep the current project secret.

column1: 未配置，可填写当前项目独立密钥
column2: Not configured; enter a project-specific secret if needed.

column1: 集中查看当前 WLS 项目的 Tag/Webhook 发布策略、脱敏配置状态和最近发布结果；完整编辑仍进入 Deploy 配置页。
column2: Review the current WLS project's tag/webhook release policy, redacted configuration status, and recent release results; full editing stays in Deploy Config.
Safely passed from the project card

column1: 来自 WLS capability 链接
为当前 WLS 项目保存独立仓库、Tag 策略、回滚参考和发布命令；保存后仍由后续发布动作显式触发。
column2: Save a dedicated repository, tag policy, rollback reference, and release command for the current WLS project; saving still requires a later explicit release action.

column1: 记录该项目发布注意事项
column2: Record release notes for this project

column1: 发布 Profile 会被后续 webhook/manual release 按项目上下文读取；当前按钮只保存配置。
column2: The release profile will be read by later webhook/manual release flows using the project context; this button only saves configuration.

column1: 仅检查当前项目发布配置、触发策略和命令白名单，不执行 Git、文件写入或服务重载。
column2: Checks only the current project release config, trigger policy, and command allowlist; it does not run Git, write files, or reload services.

column1: Only the saved Profile rollback reference is used, and it runs inside the selected project context.
column2: Only the saved Profile rollback reference is used, and it runs inside the selected project context.

column1: Confirm rollback in the selected project context
column2: Confirm rollback in the selected project context

column1: 输入 webhook payload.ref，复用当前项目 Tag/Branch 策略，只判断是否会触发发布。
column2: Enter webhook payload.ref and reuse the current project Tag/Branch policy to check whether a release would trigger.

column1: 还没有回放结果；可以先用 Tag 示例确认默认 tag-only 策略。
column2: No replay result yet; use the Tag example to confirm the default tag-only policy.

column1: Preview the exact project-scoped release path, then run it only after explicit confirmation. The server re-checks preflight and trigger policy before execution.
column2: Preview the exact project-scoped release path, then run it only after explicit confirmation. The server re-checks preflight and trigger policy before execution.

column1: Raw tag names are interpreted as tag refs in tag mode; explicit refs/tags/* and refs/heads/* are preferred.
column2: Raw tag names are interpreted as tag refs in tag mode; explicit refs/tags/* and refs/heads/* are preferred.

column1: I understand this will run Git, write release metadata, record history, and reload WLS for the selected project context.
column2: I understand this will run Git, write release metadata, record history, and reload WLS for the selected project context.

column1: No manual release plan yet. Build a tag plan first to verify the selected project Profile and trigger policy.
column2: No manual release plan yet. Build a tag plan first to verify the selected project Profile and trigger policy.

column1: 敏感字段只显示是否配置，不显示原值。
column2: Sensitive fields only show whether they are configured; raw values are not displayed.

column1: Tag 前缀 / 分支过滤
读取 var/deploy/current.json，不触发发布动作。
column2: Reads var/deploy/current.json without triggering a release.

column1: 尚未发布过；完成一次 deploy:release 或合法 Tag Webhook 后会在这里显示当前版本。
column2: No release yet; after deploy:release or a valid tag webhook, the current version will appear here.

column1: 仅显示当前 WLS 项目最近 12 条发布历史，失败记录保留错误摘要。
column2: Only the 12 most recent release records for the current WLS project are shown; failed records keep their error summary.

column1: 显示 WLS 主项目最近 12 条发布历史，失败记录保留错误摘要。
column2: The 12 most recent WLS host project release records are shown; failed records keep their error summary.

column1: 当前项目暂无发布记录。完成一次项目上下文发布或 Tag Webhook 后会写入这里。
column2: No release records for the current project yet. A project-context release or tag webhook will write records here.

column1: 暂无发布记录。完成一次命令发布或 Tag Webhook 后会写入发布历史。
column2: No release records yet. Command releases or tag webhooks will write release history.
